scripts.dev: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS="--max-old-space-size=4096" concurrently -n planner,essay,nature,ops,proxy -c cyan,green,yellow,magenta,white "npm run dev:planner" "npm run dev:essay" "npm run dev:nature" "npm run dev:ops" "npm run dev:proxy"
scripts.dev:planner-only: concurrently -n planner,proxy -c cyan,white "npm run dev:planner" "npm run dev:proxy"
scripts.dev:essay-only: concurrently -n essay,proxy -c green,white "npm run dev:essay" "npm run dev:proxy"
scripts.dev:nature-only: concurrently -n nature,proxy -c yellow,white "npm run dev:nature" "npm run dev:proxy"
scripts.dev:ops-only: concurrently -n ops,proxy -c magenta,white "npm run dev:ops" "npm run dev:proxy"
scripts.build:apps: npm run build:planner && npm run build:essay && npm run build:nature && npm run build:ops
